checks.name: webhook-contract
checks.detail: Caddy, bot readiness, and docs consistently use /telegram/webhook for public Telegram delivery.

checks.name: miniapp-auth-fail-closed
checks.detail: Mini App projection endpoints require bearer/session context and do not fall back to global access when userId is missing.

checks.name: no-public-auth-bypass
checks.detail: The public reverse proxy does not expose mutating control-plane routes through /api/* without an auth boundary.

checks.name: miniapp-base-path
checks.detail: Mini App navigation works locally and behind /miniapp, with forwarded prefix handling and prefixed links.

checks.name: approval-actions-real
checks.detail: Approval controls are real authenticated actions and are not rendered as dead href="#" controls.

checks.name: miniapp-url-discovery
checks.detail: Production Mini App URL resolution prefers HAPPYTG_MINIAPP_URL, derives from HAPPYTG_PUBLIC_URL + /miniapp, and treats HAPPYTG_APP_URL as dev-only fallback.

checks.name: menu-button-setup
checks.detail: The bot auto-configures setChatMenuButton when a valid public HTTPS Mini App URL is available and degrades readiness when it is not.

checks.name: readiness-degradation
checks.detail: /ready reports degraded status for invalid Mini App public URLs or failed menu verification.

checks.name: docs-distinguish-contracts
checks.detail: Configuration, self-hosting, and release docs distinguish webhook delivery URL, Mini App public URL, and BotFather/Menu Button setup.

checks.name: proof-metadata-closed
checks.detail: Proof bundle metadata is synchronized: no pending/unknown verifier state remains and the task is marked complete/passed.
